recentTweets.text:
Nothing is more important than saving our country for future generations.

END birthright citizenship.

PASS the SAVE America Act.

CODIFY President Trump’s border security policies.
https://t.co/F6RxCi9fas

Flock cameras have quietly become one of the most sweeping surveillance systems in American history.

And as we’ve seen in Georgia, these devices are ripe for abuse.

That’s why I’m fighting to DEFUND Flock cameras. https://t.co/095kyu4tgz

Joe Biden’s illegal alien invasion DEVASTATED our nation.

We cannot allow Democrats to reopen the floodgates in the future.

Congress MUST CODIFY President Trump’s border security policies ASAP!

American citizenship is sacred.

Congress must do everything in its power to protect it following the Supreme Court’s shameful interpretation of the 14th Amendment.
https://t.co/5pC5TqPEKw

This report confirms what we already knew: Joe Biden’s intentional illegal invasion DROVE UP housing costs and rent for the American people.

The solution? Mass deportations. https://t.co/ftfICSC8cC

RT @RepChipRoy: Congress doesn't need a constitutional amendment to address birthright citizenship. It can act now:

✅ Define "subject to t…

104-year-old World War II veteran and Pearl Harbor survivor Ken Schubring is an American hero from Georgia’s very own Ninth District.

Thank you, President Trump, for honoring him and his courageous service! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/W7iFlaZpCT
Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/b4nrHuDqEg

Happy birthday, America!

Here’s to the next 250. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/wdGnCY2Jzu

Excellent news.

As one of the three Budget Committee Republicans that stood with @chiproytx until the Green New Scam was eliminated, I was proud to defend our country all throughout the night.

RT @RepBrecheen: Tomorrow, July 4th, all new wind and solar tax subsidies will officially end.

This would not have happened without the ef…

As a Navy combat veteran, I’ve been to more than 50 countries across the globe.

NONE compare to the United States of America.

May God continue to bless our great nation. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/g1ESzxFKZp
If we can’t protect the sanctity of U.S. citizenship, then we will lose our country. https://t.co/1VBVD9yTS5
https://t.co/SvTYS0oya3
RT @DailySignal: The End EPA Abuse Act would prohibit regulations that effectively eliminate gas-powered vehicles or force nationwide trans…

America’s security, sovereignty, and citizenship are under assault.

We need to do everything we can to save our country—starting with the SAVE America Act and the Secure the Border Act. https://t.co/TwQP1xjvDX
RT @freedomcaucus: 🔥@Rep_Clyde slams SCOTUS' birthright citizenship opinion: "It's basically going to make every person in the entire world…

Chief Justice John Roberts and Justice Amy Coney Barrett should be ashamed of themselves.

Congress must act to protect American sovereignty and citizenship. https://t.co/uKOioeMnHG

RT @freedomcaucus: Republicans must make Trump’s border policies permanent law.

Otherwise, we risk a future radical Democrat administratio…
RT @toddstarnes: "It is an utter disgrace. Chief Justice John Roberts and Justice Amy Coney Barrett should be ashamed of themselves for thi…

Simply being born in the United States does not make you an American.

Yet we clearly cannot rely on the Supreme Court to uphold this truth.

It’s up to Congress to act. We must save our country before it’s too late.

The American people are sick and tired of the lies, excuses, and inaction.

The House-passed SAVE America Act is supported by a simple majority in the Senate.

We just need the Senate to do its job.

The Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship decision is an utter disgrace.

The 14th Amendment was NEVER intended to grant birthright citizenship to children of illegal aliens.

Congress must immediately take action to protect American sovereignty and citizenship.

BREAKING: The Supreme Court just ruled that states can keep men OUT of women’s sports.

Praise God!

Major win for women and girls, as well as for fairness and common sense.

If your tax dollars can be defrauded so shamelessly, then so can your ballot.

PASS THE SAVE AMERICA ACT. https://t.co/SoqTPWhqlp

Our top priorities must be election integrity and border security.

If Congress doesn’t send the SAVE America Act to President Trump’s desk & codify his border security wins, then we’ve failed to deliver real change to the American people.
RT @chiproytx: House Republicans should unify & stop running discharge petitions that empower Democrats to control what goes on the agenda…

Last year, I promised @SecWar that I would lead an amendment to codify the name change from Department of Defense to Department of War.

Yesterday, my amendment was added to the FY27 Defense appropriations bill.

Promise made, promise kept. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/s9IoT0YfmW

D.C. bureaucrats should NEVER have the power to dictate what kind of car you drive.

Today I introduced the End EPA Abuse Act to prevent any future Democrat Administration from weaponizing the EPA’s regulatory authority to advance the Left’s radical, anti-American energy agenda.
RT @RepLanceGooden: TEMPORARY MEANS TEMPORARY!

Every day, hardworking Americans show up, do their jobs, and deliver results.

All we’re asking is for the U.S. Senate to do the same.

PASS THE SAVE AMERICA ACT. https://t.co/Y15ggH9dM4

Democrats are fine with requiring photo ID to visit the Obama Presidential Library or to exercise our Second Amendment rights.

Just not when it comes to voting in American elections. https://t.co/m0IDqymd3Q

🚨BREAKING: In a 6-3 decision, the Supreme Court ruled that President Trump can END Temporary Protected Status for Haitians and Syrians.

TPS is nothing more than a loophole to permanent amnesty.

Now we must pass my Territorial Protection and Sovereignty Act to FULLY REPEAL TPS.

RT @FreedomCaucusF: Georgia Congressman @Rep_Clyde:

“The SAVE AMERICA ACT has sky high approval ratings because it is just plain common se…
RT @freedomcaucus: 🚨Freedom Caucus: Pass The SAVE America Act https://t.co/ZbXAK2aSgD
RT @freedomcaucus: 🚨TUNE IN AT 10AM ET: Freedom Caucus stands with President Trump in pressuring the Senate to pass the SAVE America Act!…

RT @RepRalphNorman: ICYMI: SAVE AMERICA ACT PRESS CONFERENCE TODAY. 🚨

This is common sense. https://t.co/sNB6iG2ZOe
